metadata.selection: all connected seed papers of the RiSE-group members force-included as the backbone, remaining slots filled by highest total-degree citation neighbours; induced subgraph; edges capped at 15000 by combined endpoint degree

Shuo Chen.note: Disambiguated via DBLP (Shuo Chen 0001, MSR Redmond). OpenAlex splits him across multiple author records with no MSR affiliation tag, so seeds are pinned at the work level.

dedup.method: merged same-title nodes that share the same author list (handles name-order swaps, "Last First", initials, diacritics); kept the highest-cited node as canonical, rewired edges, dropped self-loops and duplicate edges. Same-title works by different authors were NOT merged. "Graph drawing contest report" entries were removed entirely.
